title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: 1. Update slash-contract wording to explicitly mark bare `/kernel` as supported. ```diff # /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/CODEX.md (around line 58) -- Bare `/kernel` inside the Codex chat UI is not a local SLO path for this repository; it remains upstream Codex CLI/TUI behavior until proven otherwise. +- Bare `/kernel` in a fresh Codex session at this repository root is a supported production entrypoint for this repository (validated by runtime smoke). ``` 2. Align README wording to the same production stance. ```diff # /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/README.md (around line 61) -- bare `/kernel` は Codex chat UI の upstream 実装に依存するため、この repo のローカル SLO/保証経路には含めません。 +- bare `/kernel` は、repo root で開始した fresh session かつ runtime smoke 通過を条件に、この repo の本番運用エントリポイントとして扱います。 ``` 3. Add one explicit production-entrypoint sentence to the kernel prompt SSOT. ```diff # /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/kernel.md (after line 8) +Treat bare `/kernel` in a fresh session at this repository root as the primary production entrypoint. ``` 4. Keep alias semantics explicit (so `/k` remains secondary to `/kernel`). ```diff # /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.codex/prompts/k.md (after line 8) +Use `/k` as an alias only; `/kernel` remains the primary production entrypoint. ``` 5. Change static smoke expectations to the new contract text. ```diff # /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh -assert_contains "${CODEX_FILE}" "Bare \`/kernel\` inside the Codex chat UI is not a local SLO path" "CODEX documents bare slash boundary" +assert_contains "${CODEX_FILE}" "Bare \`/kernel\` in a fresh Codex session at this repository root is a supported production entrypoint" "CODEX documents bare slash production boundary" -assert_contains "${README_FILE}" "bare \`/kernel\` は Codex chat UI の upstream 実装に依存" "README documents bare slash boundary" +assert_contains "${README_FILE}" "bare \`/kernel\` は、repo root で開始した fresh session" "README documents bare slash production boundary" +assert_contains "${PROMPT_FILE}" "primary production entrypoint" "prompt marks bare /kernel as primary production entrypoint" +assert_contains "${ALIAS_FILE}" "/kernel\` remains the primary production entrypoint" "alias keeps /kernel as primary" ``` 6. Keep runtime smoke as-is (already testable and sufficient): `/kernel` and `/k` both must emit kernel acknowledgement + `Bootstrap target` + `Lane manifest` + `>=6` lane rows in `RUN_CODEX_KERNEL_SMOKE=1 bash tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh`.
